title: KOSMOS User Keybinding Overrides (Spec 288)
description: Citizen-editable override file at ~/.kosmos/keybindings.json. Maps chord strings to TierOneAction names, or null to disable a binding. Missing or invalid file degrades silently to defaults (FR-023, FR-024). NOTE: the `meta` modifier is accepted syntactically but normalises to `alt` at parse time because Ink collapses terminal alt/meta into a single flag and the matcher emits `alt+<key>` at runtime. So `{"meta+k": "history-search"}` and `{"alt+k": "history-search"}` are semantically identical. Addresses Codex P2 on PR #1591.

oneOf.description: Disable this binding (FR-025). The chord becomes a no-op.
Remap the chord to this TierOneAction (FR-026). Reserved actions (agent-interrupt, session-exit) MUST NOT appear as remap targets — attempted remaps are rejected by validate.ts (FR-027).
